/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Wall -Wextra -Wshadow -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Wunused -Wcast-align -Wformat=2 -std=c++14 -pthread -O2 -g -DNDEBUG  -Wl,-rpath=$ORIGIN -shared -Wl,-soname,libsyscollector.so -o lib/libsyscollector.so CMakeFiles/syscollector.dir/src/syscollector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/syscollector.dir/src/syscollectorImp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/syscollector.dir/src/syscollectorNormalizer.cpp.o   -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/shared_modules/dbsync/build/lib  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/shared_modules/rsync/build/lib  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/data_provider/build/lib  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/openssl  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/sqlite  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/cJSON  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/procps  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/bzip2  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/flatbuffers/build  -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/shared_modules/dbsync/build/lib:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/shared_modules/rsync/build/lib:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/data_provider/build/lib:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/openssl:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/sqlite:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/cJSON:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/procps:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/bzip2:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/flatbuffers/build -ldbsync -lrsync -lsysinfo -lwazuhext
